description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 31 hrs 47 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 29 mins. His coding was mostly in Java, along with Other and Markdown. The activity data does not list any public GitHub repos, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
